//: SuperNoNo Claude Code adapter (Phase 2.2.0). Merge the `hooks` object below into your .claude/settings.json (project-level recommended) or ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace <ADAPTER_DIR> with the absolute path of this directory, e.g. C:\Users\you\multiagent-work-assistant\adapters\claude-code (double backslashes inside JSON). Bare `node` is probe-verified to resolve in the hook environment on Windows; if your setup differs, use the absolute node path. Restart the Claude Code session after editing settings.
